---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Have an idea to make Sidecar better? We'd love to hear it!
title: "💡 "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 What's your idea?

_Describe what you'd like Sidecar to do. Plain English is perfect!_

## 🎯 Which part of the experience?

_Check all that apply:_

- [ ] 👀 **Watch Mode** — the running narration of what developers do
- [ ] 💬 **Ask Mode** — asking questions and getting answers
- [ ] 💡 **Suggested Questions** — the numbered question prompts
- [ ] 🛡️ **Safety Check** — the `safe?` reassurance feature
- [ ] 📖 **Glossary** — the personal dictionary of terms
- [ ] 🎬 **Demo Mode** — pre-recorded walkthroughs
- [ ] 🔧 **Installation** — the setup and install process
- [ ] 🖥️ **tmux / Layout** — how the panels look and behave
- [ ] 🆕 **Something entirely new**

## 🤔 Why would this help?

_Who would benefit? What problem does it solve?_

## 📝 Example

_If you can, show what the experience would look like:_

```
What I'd type:    ...
What I'd see:     ...
```

## 💬 Anything else?

_Screenshots, links, or any extra context._

---

> 🎉 **Thank you for sharing your idea!** Sidecar was built for people like you,
> so your perspective is exactly what we need.
